module_description: Monitors CPU usage on the bound host (locally or over SSH) and alerts when it exceeds the configured threshold.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable this CPU check.
hints.threads: Number of hosts to check in parallel.
hints.interval: Sampling window in seconds used to measure CPU usage on the host.
hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.alert: CPU usage threshold (%). An alert is triggered when usage exceeds this value.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new check name or identifier:
